query:
SELECT p.id, p.name, p.isLive, COUNT(t.id) as transaction_count 
FROM portfolios p 
LEFT JOIN transactions t ON t.portfolioId = p.id 
WHERE p.name LIKE '%Marc Test%' OR p.name = 'Regula' OR p.name LIKE '%Portfolio Test%'
GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.isLive
ORDER BY p.name
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2w4G5FWonHi6U6L.root --database aQvizP6Ne8LKEmBGrk5vq4 --execute SELECT p.id, p.name, p.isLive, COUNT(t.id) as transaction_count 
FROM portfolios p 
LEFT JOIN transactions t ON t.portfolioId = p.id 
WHERE p.name LIKE '%Marc Test%' OR p.name = 'Regula' OR p.name LIKE '%Portfolio Test%'
GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.isLive
